artifacts.summary: The crawl found one direct official Nankai policy source: a Nankai-hosted PDF titled 南开大学本科教学人工智能工具使用规范（试行）. Other official pages discussed or republished generative AI material but were not used as Nankai policy evidence.

artifacts.evidenceSnippet: 近日，教育部教师队伍建设专家指导委员会正式发布《教师生成式人工智能应用指引（第一版）》（以下简称《指引》）
artifacts.notes: The source attributes the guide to the Education Ministry teacher team expert committee and People's Education WeChat, so it was not treated as Nankai-specific policy evidence.

artifacts.evidenceSnippet: 近日，南开大学计算机学院媒体计算实验室取得最新研究成果，不仅从评估的角度揭示了现有AI检测方法的性能不足
artifacts.notes: Research-showcase article was excluded from policy claims.

artifacts.evidenceSnippet: 能写论文、做翻译、编程序、出方案甚至代写情书、辞职信……最近，ChatGPT迅速火爆全网。
artifacts.notes: Media commentary was excluded because it contains expert views and general background, not university policy.

artifacts.sourceTitle: 南开大学本科教学人工智能工具使用规范（试行）

artifacts.claimText: Nankai University's trial undergraduate teaching AI tool use norm applies to undergraduate teaching, learning, examination, evaluation, and management activities, while encouraging teaching units, teachers, and students to use AI tools reasonably in specified teaching and learning contexts.

citation.citationTitle: 南开大学本科教学人工智能工具使用规范（试行）
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: 南开大学本科教学人工智能工具使用规范（试行）
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: 第一条 在遵守现有教育教学规范和法律法规的前提下，鼓励各教学单位推动课程、教材、教学数字化变革，将人工智能技术融入教育教学全要素全过程，提升师生人工智能素养。第四条 本规范适用于本科教学的“教、学、考、评、管”各个环节。
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The norm encourages teaching units to integrate AI into teaching and says it applies to undergraduate teaching, learning, examination, evaluation, and management.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.citationTitle: 南开大学本科教学人工智能工具使用规范（试行）
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.notes: Approved as a source-scoped undergraduate teaching norm claim only.

artifacts.claimText: Nankai University's undergraduate AI tool norm permits students, with course teacher or supervisor consent and where core assessment or innovation is not affected, to use AI tools for literature search and management, grammar and formatting support with marked generated content, chart production from real data, and code assistance subject to author review and testing.

citation.citationTitle: 南开大学本科教学人工智能工具使用规范（试行）
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: 南开大学本科教学人工智能工具使用规范（试行）
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: 第八条 允许使用的范围。在征得任课教师或指导教师同意的前提下，且 AI 工具辅助完成的内容不会对课程作业、毕业论文（设计）、实验报告等的核心内容和创新能力考查造成影响时，学生可以在以下范围内合理使用 AI 工具。1.允许使用 AI 工具进行文献检索、资料收集、关键词推荐和文献管理
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: Students may reasonably use AI tools in listed ways after teacher or supervisor consent and when core work or innovation assessment is not affected.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.citationTitle: 南开大学本科教学人工智能工具使用规范（试行）
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.notes: Approved with consent and assessment-scope conditions preserved.

artifacts.claimText: Nankai University's undergraduate AI tool norm prohibits AI use for confidential or sensitive-content creation, uploading confidential content to AI platforms, generating or altering core arguments or research data, academic misconduct such as ghostwriting, plagiarism, or copying, and AI use in listed midterm and final assessment formats unless a teacher explains a special-use case in advance.

citation.citationTitle: 南开大学本科教学人工智能工具使用规范（试行）
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: 南开大学本科教学人工智能工具使用规范（试行）
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: 第九条 禁止使用的范围。1.禁止使用 AI 工具进行任何涉及敏感信息（如个人隐私、商业秘密等）或涉及保密的内容创作，禁止将涉密内容上传至任何 AI 平台。2.禁止使用 AI 工具生成或篡改原始核心论点、实验数据、调研数据，禁止使用 AI 工具生成基于虚假研究数据的图表、图片。3.禁止使用 AI 工具进行代写、抄袭、剽窃等学术不端行为。
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The norm prohibits AI use involving sensitive or confidential content, core data or argument fabrication, and academic misconduct.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.citationTitle: 南开大学本科教学人工智能工具使用规范（试行）
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.notes: Approved because the claim uses prohibitive language only where the source uses 禁止.

artifacts.claimText: Nankai University's undergraduate AI tool norm says students should clearly explain and mark specific AI-generated content in coursework, graduation theses or designs, and lab reports, and should keep complete AI tool use records such as prompts, outputs, and selected use for checking.

citation.citationTitle: 南开大学本科教学人工智能工具使用规范（试行）
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: 南开大学本科教学人工智能工具使用规范（试行）
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: 第十一条 对于 AI 工具生成的具体内容，学生应在课程作业、毕业论文（设计）、实验报告等文中明确说明和进行标注。并保存完整 AI 工具使用记录（如输入指令内容、生成输出结果、筛选运用等），以备核查。
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: Students should mark AI-generated content in academic work and keep complete AI tool use records for checking.

citation.citationTitle: 南开大学本科教学人工智能工具使用规范（试行）
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.notes: Approved with 应 translated as should rather than must.

artifacts.claimText: Nankai University's undergraduate AI tool norm states that the university will provide an AIGC detection tool for teaching units to check AI tool use in coursework, graduation theses or designs, and lab reports, with results for teacher and supervisor reference; students who violate the norm may receive lower course or thesis grades, lose defense eligibility, or be handled under academic misconduct rules.

citation.citationTitle: 南开大学本科教学人工智能工具使用规范（试行）
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: 南开大学本科教学人工智能工具使用规范（试行）
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: 第十三条 学校将提供 AIGC 检测工具，各教学单位可对课程作业、毕业论文（设计）、实验报告等使用 AI 工具的情况进行 AIGC 检测，AIGC 检测结果供任课教师和指导教师参考使用。第十四条 学生违反本规范使用 AI 工具的，视情节给予降低课程或毕业论文（设计）考核成绩、取消答辩资格等处理。构成学术不端的，按照学校相关规定予以处理。
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The norm says the university will provide AIGC detection and describes possible consequences for violating the AI tool use norm.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.notes: Approved as undergraduate teaching norm evidence; consequence wording keeps the source's conditional 视情节 framing.

artifacts.title: Nankai University staged AI policy evidence
artifacts.summary: This staged bundle uses one official Nankai-hosted PDF, 南开大学本科教学人工智能工具使用规范（试行）, as the source for undergraduate teaching AI tool use claims. The source covers scope, conditional permitted student use, prohibited uses, disclosure and recordkeeping, AIGC detection, and consequences. Other official pages discovered during the crawl were rejected because they were Ministry-guide republication, research-showcase, or media-commentary sources rather than Nankai policy evidence.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
The verified source is scoped to undergraduate teaching and should not be generalized to all Nankai research, staff, graduate, or administrative AI use.
Rejected official pages were not used as claims because they did not state Nankai-specific policy rules.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
